transcript.text:
Hello
[Is this how you do ASMR?]
Am I doing it right?
I'm not sure about this
I'm confused
I give up
Hello everyone
I am here at Boor Chicken
I received a sponsorship from them since I've been eating here since I was little
It's been a while since I've been here and this place changed a lot
Their logo changed as well
[2-hours ticket at Boor Chicken]
First off,
I'll take all of this
And the katsu box as well
I used to work at Sulbean (Shaved Ice Store)

Check that out
[Grabs a handful]
[I'm hungry]
[Where's my chicken?]
I know she's a good eat, But I think this will be too much because of the katsu box
[Sweet & Sour] [Deli Combo] [Crispy Combo] [Shocking Combo]
[Chicken Katsu Bento Box] Thank you
Enjoy Thank you
[Chicken Katsu Bento Box will be released on 2/17] Never seen anything like this
This alone will fill you up
Not me though
There's sauce inside
I've never seen it come in a bento box
Bon appetit
Looks scrumptious
The sauce is amazing

It has a kick to it
It's really good It's like a soy sauce base with some spice
This is exceptional
It's a bit spicy
This is perfect for a quick lunch
Let's try the chicken now
It's pretty big
Hot!
[Steaming hot]
[Time to fuel]
I brought this cup from home
I like drinking juice,
but you have to drink coke with fried chicken
The meat is very tender
The portion though
I personally think this is a lot of food from just 1 combo meal

5 of these huge drumsticks
5 wings and 5 thighs
I guess it's 5 of each
That's a lot
[Sweet & Sour Chicken] These are sweet potato cubes. I love it
It's like the honey glazed sweet potato
It's just like that with some spiciness
This possibly can't go wrong
It's more like a sweet & sour than sweet & spicy
This is deli
Up close
I love the extra batter
It tastes like the soy sauce chicken
This is their most popular dish
Shocking Flavor Combo The green chili pepper looks spicy
Delicious

[Let's try the sauce]
It's like a very thick soy sauce-based sauce
With a little bit of spiciness
[Here]
[All of a sudden?]
There's so much noise around What do you mean "asmr"..
[The sound from here will be exactly like what Tzuyang hears from her earphones]
[Audio, Check]
[Ready to go]
[Is this correct?]
[Can't hear it]
What am I doing?
[You didn't press 'Record']
[I can hear it]
[Doing ASMR by herself..]
I'm sorry, it wasn't recording

[Are you kidding me?]
We didn't press 'record'
[Sorry, it's our first time doing this]
[Again]
[It's working now]
Hello
I'm not sure if this will be a good asmr because of all the noise that's going on
Let's get started
[Vehicle passing by]
[Coca cola sound too]
Oops
Nope
[How about some ice?]
My ears hurt
[Noisy]
[This is weird..]

[Another vehicle passing by]
[Ruined] I can't do this
[Bye]
[This is it]
I don't think I can do ASMR
Because I have to be careful of what I'm saying
Yum
This flavor is very addicting
It's sweet and spicy A good mixture
I'm able to eat drumsticks in 1 bite from other chicken places
But not this one Should I try it?
How about with a smaller size?
[Yes, that's a 'small' drumstick]
[Too big]
I can usually do it with no problem
I've always been told that the meat is more tender on smaller chickens,

But this is a big chicken with some tender meat
Excuse me,
Can I have some beer?
You can do whatever you want in here
Anything?
[Are you sure?] Yes
[This mukbang was filmed during break hours 15:00~17:00]
Both of these work?
How do I do this?
Oh, right
Oh no
There
Thank you
Some snack too
[A whole bowl]
Leave this here, Can I just take this instead?

[Sure! Our security camera is on]
I'm here alone at the restaurant
It feels like I borrowed the whole place since I'm doing whatever I want in here
The draft beer is excellent
Tasty
It goes really well with the chicken
Go away veggies!
It's good
It gets better the more I eat it
[Coke vs Beer]
Dilemma
[Coke wins]
It's been so long since I've had alcohol outside of home
Ever since covid
That's spicy
This is one of the best chicken bento boxes I've ever had

This place is very different from how I remember when I was little
There was 1 in front of my house when I was in 1st grade
How much was 1 chicken?
It was very cheap
I remember going there with my family at least 2 times a week
Since it was nearby, we would always to-go
Wait, how old is 1st grade? 8?
So it's been over 10 years already?
No way
Already?
I love the extra crisp on the side
I love the skin
Like this
The taste is definitely different from dining-in and getting it delivered
Freshly fried chicken is the best
I'm sorry, but our break time is over soon

We have to open for business again
Right, I took a long time
I will get the rest for to-go
How was it? It was great
Everything was so good, even the beer
Enjoy Thank you
Thank you!
I will eat the rest at home
Thanks everyone
Can't leave the chicken
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
